samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_8bit">
    <description>Implement an 8-bit multiplier based on shifting and adding.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="A" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input multiplicand.</input>
        <input id="B" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input multiplier.</input>
        <output id="product" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit output product.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="N">8</parameter>
        <parameter id="N_BIT">16</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>
        <sequential_logic>
            <reg id="shift_A" width_description="[15:0]">Shifted multiplicand.</reg>
            <reg id="product_temp" width_description="[15:0]">Temporary product.</reg>
            <reg id="counter" width_description="[3:0]">Iteration counter.</reg>
            <reg id="done">Done flag.</reg>
            <always>
                <if>
                    <condition>
                        <and>
                            <equal>
                                <identifier id="counter"/>
                                <literal value="0"/>
                            </equal>
                            <not>
                                <equal>
                                    <identifier id="product_temp"/>
                                    <literal value="0"/>
                                </equal>
                            </not>
                        </and>
                    </condition>
                    <then>
                        <nonblocking>
                            <assign>
                                <identifier id="product"/>
                                <identifier id="product_temp"/>
                            </assign>
                            <assign>
                                <identifier id="done"/>
                                <literal value="1"/>
                            </assign>
                        </nonblocking>
                    </then>
                    <else>
                        <nonblocking>
                            <assign>
                                <identifier id="shift_A"/>
                                <concat>
                                    <identifier id="shift_A"/>
                                    <literal value="0"/>
                                </concat>
                            </assign>
                            <assign>
                                <identifier id="counter"/>
                                <plus>
                                    <identifier id="counter"/>
                                    <literal value="1"/>
                                </plus>
                            </assign>
                            <assign>
                                <identifier id="product_temp"/>
                                <plus>
                                    <identifier id="product_temp"/>
                                    <identifier id="shift_A"/>
                                </plus>
                            </assign>
                        </nonblocking>
                    </else>
                </if>
            </always>
        </sequential_logic>
    </implementation>
</module>
